meta.title: How America could build the best stealth fighter in history
meta.description:
If you were put in charge of developing America’s next air superiority fighter—an aircraft purpose-built to dominate the skies over even the most hotly contested warzones of the 21st century—how would you go about doing it? What systems, capabilities and cutting-edge technologies would you build your new fighter around?

That’s a question that was actually posed to America’s premier defense contractors in recent years under secretive developmental programs like the Air Force’s Next Generation Air Dominance (NGAD) and the Navy’s F/A-XX effort. And it's one we aim to answer in this two-parter. 

This video covers how to make the stealthiest fighter in history. Next week, we'll cover avionics, countermeasures, and the drone wingmen that'll fly alongside our notional fighter!

Huge thanks to Rodrigo Avella for the use of his incredible artwork in the thumbnail of this video and in our full write-up! Check out his website: https://rodrigoavella.com/

📱 Follow Rodrigo Avella on Instagram for more great artwork: https://www.instagram.com/rodrigo.avella

📱 Follow Sandboxx News on social
Twitter: https://twitter.com/sandboxxnews
Instagram: https://instagram.com/sandboxxnews
Facebook: https://facebook.com/sandboxxnews

📱 Follow Alex Hollings on social
Twitter: https://twitter.com/AlexHollings52
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/alexhollingswrites
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/AlexHollingsWrites

Further Reading:
Read the complete write up: https://www.sandboxx.us/blog/what-kind-of-fighter-could-the-latest-military-tech-really-build/
Learn more about Active Flow Control:
https://www.sandboxx.us/blog/is-this-the-technology-that-will-define-6th-generation-fighters/
How America's new fighters are learning from the F-35: https://www.sandboxx.us/blog/new-us-fighter-programs-are-learning-what-not-to-do-from-the-f-35/
Learn more about the NGAD: https://www.sandboxx.us/blog/what-artist-renderings-tell-us-about-the-ngad-fighter/
Learn more about GE's XA100: https://www.sandboxx.us/blog/the-air-force-is-eyeing-groundbreaking-new-engines-for-the-f-35/

Citations:
"Active Flow Control Using Sweeping Jet Actuators on a Semi-Span Wing Model" in the  American Institute of Aeronautics and Astronautics: 
https://arc.aiaa.org/doi/10.2514/6.2016-1817
"Energy deposition characteristics of nanosecond dielectric barrier discharge plasma actuators: Influence of dielectric material" in the Journal of Applied Physics: https://aip.scitation.org/doi/10.1063/1.4929362
"Multifunctional Ceramic Composite System for Simultaneous Thermal Protection and Electromagnetic Interference Shielding for Carbon Fiber-Reinforced Polymer Composites" in ACS Applied Materials & Interfaces: https://pubs.acs.org/doi/10.1021/acsami.0c17361
